tiers.name: Getting Started
tiers.description: Daily operations loop. Run Chief smoothly.

tiers.name: Building Rhythm
tiers.description: Delegate, coach, connect daily work to rocks.

modules.success_criteria: Run morning briefing 3x independently, capture key insights

role_notes.ceo: Keep under 5 minutes. Focus on decisions needed today.
role_notes.cos: Emphasize delegation routing and calendar conflicts.
role_notes.vp: Focus on team-facing priorities and upcoming commitments.

modules.nudge_phrase: start your day with a morning briefing

modules.success_criteria: Process inbox to zero 3x using the triage framework (do/delegate/defer/delete)

role_notes.ceo: Focus on delegation routing. Most inbox items should go to someone else.
role_notes.cos: Emphasize tracking commitments made in responses.
role_notes.vp: Focus on client-facing items and team requests.

modules.nudge_phrase: process your inbox to zero

modules.success_criteria: Run daily review 3x, carry forward incomplete items, update task state

role_notes.ceo: Focus on what decisions were made vs deferred.
role_notes.cos: Emphasize delegation status and tomorrow's prep.
role_notes.vp: Focus on team deliverables and client commitments.

modules.nudge_phrase: close out your day with a daily review

modules.success_criteria: Pre-brief 2 meetings with attendee context, objectives, and talking points

role_notes.ceo: Focus on board and investor meetings. What decision is needed?
role_notes.cos: Emphasize cross-functional meetings and alignment checks.
role_notes.vp: Focus on client meetings and team ceremonies.

modules.nudge_phrase: prep for your upcoming meetings automatically

modules.success_criteria: Create 3 delegations, track through completion, use nudge system for overdue items

role_notes.ceo: Delegate to your directs, not their teams. Trust the chain.
role_notes.cos: Track both your delegations and the exec's. You're the accountability loop.
role_notes.vp: Balance delegation with coaching. Use delegation as a development tool.

modules.nudge_phrase: track your delegations so nothing falls through

modules.success_criteria: Prep 3 one-on-ones with full context (interactions, action items, talking points)

role_notes.ceo: Focus on strategic alignment and development. Less operational detail.
role_notes.cos: Full operational detail. You're the connective tissue.
role_notes.vp: Balance career development with project accountability.

modules.nudge_phrase: prep for your one-on-ones with full context

modules.success_criteria: Send 2 calibrated follow-up messages on overdue delegations

role_notes.ceo: Nudges should be brief and direct. You're the CEO.
role_notes.cos: Calibrate tone — some nudges are from you, some on behalf of the exec.
role_notes.vp: Balance accountability with empathy. First nudge is a check-in, not a demand.

modules.nudge_phrase: automatically follow up on overdue items

modules.success_criteria: Build one performance review with evidence from interactions, delegations, and goals

role_notes.ceo: Focus on strategic impact and leadership presence.
role_notes.cos: Include operational reliability and cross-functional effectiveness.
role_notes.vp: Include client outcomes and team development metrics.

modules.nudge_phrase: build evidence-based performance reviews

modules.success_criteria: Run 2 rock reviews, identify at-risk items, propose corrective actions

role_notes.ceo: Focus on the 2-3 rocks that matter most. Ruthless prioritization.
role_notes.cos: Track all rocks across the leadership team. Surface conflicts.
role_notes.vp: Connect your rocks to the company rocks. Show the thread.

modules.nudge_phrase: check progress on your quarterly rocks

modules.success_criteria: Map current activity against quarterly goals, identify drift, propose corrections

role_notes.ceo: Are you spending time on what matters? Honest audit.
role_notes.cos: Is the exec's calendar aligned with their stated priorities?
role_notes.vp: Is your team's work rolling up to the right rocks?

modules.nudge_phrase: see if your time aligns with your priorities

modules.success_criteria: Build one strategy using the action agenda methodology (diagnosis → guiding policy → coherent actions)

role_notes.ceo: Focus on competitive positioning and resource allocation.
role_notes.cos: Focus on operational strategy and execution planning.
role_notes.vp: Focus on go-to-market and team capability building.

modules.nudge_phrase: build a real strategy with diagnosis and actions

modules.success_criteria: Track 2 initiatives through status updates, surface blockers, connect to rocks

role_notes.ceo: Portfolio view. Which initiatives are worth continuing?
role_notes.vp: Your initiatives and their resource requirements.

modules.nudge_phrase: track your strategic initiatives in one place

modules.success_criteria: Run 2 pipeline reviews, identify at-risk deals, propose next actions

role_notes.ceo: Top of funnel health and close rate trends. Board-level view.
role_notes.vp: Your deals, your team's deals, forecast accuracy.

modules.nudge_phrase: review your pipeline and spot at-risk deals

modules.success_criteria: Prep 2 client meetings with account context, attendee research, and talking points

role_notes.ceo: Focus on relationship and strategic alignment, not deal mechanics.
role_notes.cos: Full context: deal stage, history, blockers, stakeholder map.
role_notes.vp: Technical depth + commercial context. Know the ask.

modules.nudge_phrase: prep for client meetings with full account context

modules.success_criteria: Build one account strategy with history, contacts, whitespace, and recommended playbook

role_notes.ceo: Portfolio view: which accounts deserve more investment?
role_notes.cos: Execution plan: who does what, by when.
role_notes.vp: Land and expand: where's the next wedge?

modules.nudge_phrase: build an account strategy with growth playbook

modules.success_criteria: Draft 3 emails calibrated for recipient, relationship, and context

role_notes.ceo: Brevity is authority. Short emails, clear asks.
role_notes.cos: Calibrate tone by audience — board, client, team, vendor.
role_notes.vp: Professional but human. Match the culture.

modules.nudge_phrase: draft emails calibrated for each recipient

modules.success_criteria: Generate talking points for 2 events (meetings, panels, podcasts, or internal comms)

role_notes.cos: Operational precision. Lead with the numbers.
role_notes.vp: Client-facing polish. Lead with the value.

modules.nudge_phrase: generate talking points for meetings or events

modules.success_criteria: Build one presentation from an idea or outline with structure, narrative, and visuals

role_notes.ceo: 10 slides max. Story arc: problem → insight → solution → ask.
role_notes.vp: Client presentations: value proposition, proof points, next steps.

modules.nudge_phrase: build presentations from ideas to finished decks

modules.success_criteria: Plan and track thought leadership output for 2 weeks

role_notes.ceo: Thought leadership tied to company narrative.
role_notes.vp: Build your personal brand aligned to company positioning.

modules.nudge_phrase: plan and track your thought leadership content

modules.success_criteria: User can name all agents and describe their domains
modules.nudge_phrase: get an overview of the full system

modules.success_criteria: Use /capture, /find, /archive, /status, and /prioritize independently
modules.nudge_phrase: learn the core commands you'll use every day

modules.success_criteria: Create, track, and close delegations using /delegate and the tracker
modules.nudge_phrase: understand how delegation tracking works end-to-end

modules.success_criteria: Run daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly review operations
modules.nudge_phrase: set up daily, weekly, and quarterly review cadences

modules.success_criteria: Work through one decision using the RAPID framework via /decide
modules.nudge_phrase: work through important decisions with a structured framework

modules.success_criteria: Add a personal block to one agent and verify it survives a mock evolution
modules.nudge_phrase: customize the system to fit your workflow

modules.success_criteria: Understand system vs personal blocks, evolution lifecycle, and how updates are applied
modules.nudge_phrase: understand how the system evolves and upgrades

modules.success_criteria: Understand what M365 connection enables across agents (email, calendar, Teams)
modules.nudge_phrase: see how your Microsoft 365 data powers the system

modules.success_criteria: Understand what CRM connection enables for Chase (pipeline, accounts, contacts)
modules.nudge_phrase: connect your CRM for live pipeline data

modules.success_criteria: Template for connector training modules. Evolutions register new connectors using this pattern.

pacing.notes: Suggestions frame capabilities, never agent names. 'Would you like to learn about daily reviews?' not 'Run the chief-daily-review module.'
